creator: saper@saper.info
text:
Do you have stdout of the openoffice.org open? Just start OOo from 
command-line not from some kind ogf GUI menu.

It might be that you don't get a core file in case of some glib errors. 
I used to attach debuger to the soffice.bin process and trace it until 
it broke.

The stdout may give some hints.

Did you try any of the patches?

-- 
               << Marcin Cieslak // saper@saper.info >>
